case_title: MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. VS. JILL MISTRETTA et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. AS TO RESPONDENT MISTRETTA, JILL DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MISTRETTA, JILL $18,209.55 PRINCIPAL, $1,886.26 INTEREST, $336.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,432.61, (ONE TIME PAYMENT OF $150.00 HAS BEEN OFFSETTED AGAINST THE PRINCIPAL BALANCE OF $18,359.55) NO S.A.S.E.
